de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<S>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode<S>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBlockStartNode<S>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionBranchStatement, ExecutionLoopCondition, ExecutionLoopStatement

    public abstract class AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>
extends AbstractExecutionNode<S>
implements IExecutionBlockStartNode<S>
    Provides a basic implementation of IExecutionBlockStartNode.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Detail

      • isBlockOpened

        public boolean isBlockOpened()
        Checks if a block might be opened.
        Specified by:
        isBlockOpened in interface IExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>
        Returns:
        false block is definitively not opened, true block is or might be opened.

      • setBlockOpened

        public void setBlockOpened(boolean blockOpened)
        Defines if a block might be opened or not.
        Parameters:
        blockOpened - false block is definitively not opened, true block is or might be opened.
